economic_notes: Member of Prince Albert Grand Council (12 Nations). Investments in Prince Albert First Nations Business Development LP (8.33% ownership) and Prince Albert Development Corporation (8.33% ownership) recorded under modified equity method. Received $50,000 distributions from PA First Nations Business Development LP. Active specific claim negotiation against Government of Canada initiated in 2019.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 — not 2024. Consolidation includes Shoal Lake Cree Nation Operations and Section 95 Social Housing Operation. Two government business enterprises accounted for under modified equity method: Prince Albert Development Corporation and Prince Albert First Nations Business Development LP. Debt covenant violation noted on one loan agreement — lender waived right to demand immediate repayment. CMHC replacement reserve underfunded relative to required level ($463,597 actual vs $1,541,219 required). Active specific claim against Government of Canada (2019). Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($17,830,882) + PAGC ($1,285,660) + CMHC ($719,955) + First Nations Trust ($430,658) + Nechapanuk Centre CFS ($149,909) + NLCDC ($85,110) = $20,502,174; OSR = total revenue minus government transfers. No schedule of remuneration included in the document.
